assignments.name: Add_Contact_Owner_ID_to_Collection
assignments.label: Add Contact Owner ID to Collection

assignments.name: Add_Lead_Owner_ID_to_Collection
assignments.label: Add Lead Owner ID to Collection

rules.name: Contact_Hard_MQL_Status
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 AND 2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7)))
rules.label: Contact - Hard MQL Status

rules.name: Contact_Soft_MQL_Status
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR (2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6 AND 7))
rules.label: Contact - Soft MQL Status

decisions.description: MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix MIS-6227 - First MQL Date Update
decisions.name: Contact_Relevant_for_First_MQL_Date
decisions.label: Contact - Relevant for First MQL Date?

rules.name: Lead_Hard_MQL_Status
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 AND 2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7)))
rules.label: Lead - Hard MQL Status

rules.name: Lead_Soft_MQL_Status
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR (2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6 AND 7))
rules.label: Lead - Soft MQL Status

decisions.description: MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix MIS-6336 MIS-6227 - First MQL Date Update
decisions.name: Relevant_for_First_MQL_Date
decisions.label: Lead - Relevant for First MQL Date?

Flow.description: MIS-6637 - FitScore Calc Before First MQL Date MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix MIS-6336 - First MQL Date 2.0 MIS-6259 - MQL Notifications Update 2 MIS-6255 - MQL Notifications Update MIS-6227 - First MQL Date Update MIS-5743 MIS-5529

formulas.description: MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix if fit score is latest → take fit score if intent_first_medium_date__c or intent_first_high_date__c) is later than SW Fit score timestamp → take the earliest between intent_first_medium_date__c or intent_first_high_date__c
formulas.name: Contact_Fit_Score_Intent_Compare
Contact_fr_body_for_log
formulas.expression: " Business_Unit__c = " + ({!Get_Contact.Business_Unit__c})+", "+ " Clean_Domain__c = " + ({!Get_Contact.Clean_Domain__c})+", "+ " Country = " + ({!Get_Contact.MailingCountry})+", "+ " CountryCode = " + text({!Get_Contact.MailingCountryCode})+", "+ " Department__c = " + {!Contact_Get_FitScore.Var_Department}+", "+ " Department_Other_Description__c = " + ({!Get_Contact.Department_Other_Description__c})+", "+ " Email_Address_Domain_Type__c = " + text({!Get_Contact.Email_address_domain_type__c})+", "+ " Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c = " + ({!Get_Contact.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c})+", "+ " Employees_Min_FR__c = " + text({!Get_Contact.Employees_Min_FR__c})+", "+ " Lead Source = " + text({!Get_Contact.LeadSource})+", "+ " Quiz Data Incomplete = " + {!Get_Contact.Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c}+", "+ " ROE_Division__c = " + ({!Get_Contact.ROE_Division__c})+", "+ " Secondary_Email__c = " + ({!Get_Contact.Secondary_email__c})+", "+ " Seniority__c = " + text({!Get_Contact.Seniority__c})+", "+ " SI Enrichment Visit = " + text({!Get_Contact.SI_Enrichment_Visits__c})+", "+ " SW_Industry__c = " + ({!Get_Contact.SW_Industry__c})+", "+ " Title = " + ({!Get_Contact.Title})+", "+ " Use_of_Similarweb__c = " + text({!Get_Contact.Use_of_Similarweb__c})+", "+ " Website = " + ({!Get_Contact.Website__c})+", "+ " LinkedIn Profile = " + ({!Get_Contact.LinkedIn_Profile__c})+", "+ " Website = " + ({!Get_Contact.Website__c})+", "+ " SI_Enrichment_Visits__c = " + text({!Get_Contact.SI_Enrichment_Visits__c})+", "+ " sw_connector_Total Monthly Visits = " + text({!Get_Contact.Account.sw_connector__swId__r.sw_connector__Visits__c})+", "+ " Clean Domain = " + ({!Get_Contact.Clean_Domain__c})+", "+ " ROE_Division__c = " + ({!Get_Contact.ROE_Division__c})

formulas.description: MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix
formulas.name: Contact_SW_Fit_Score_Timestamp_2100

formulas.description: MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix
formulas.name: Intent_First_High_Date_2100

formulas.description: MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix
formulas.name: Intent_First_Medium_Date_2100

formulas.description: MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix MIS-6366
formulas.name: Lead_Fit_Score_Intent_Compare
Lead_fr_body_for_log
formulas.expression: " Business_Unit__c = " + text({!Get_Lead.Business_Unit__c})+", "+ " Clean_Domain__c = " + ({!Get_Lead.Clean_Domain__c})+", "+ " Country = " + ({!Get_Lead.Country})+", "+ " CountryCode = " + text({!Get_Lead.CountryCode})+", "+ " Department__c = " + {!Lead_Get_FitScore.Var_Department}+", "+ " Department_Other_Description__c = " + ({!Get_Lead.Department_Other_Description__c})+", "+ " Email_Address_Domain_Type__c = " + text({!Get_Lead.Email_address_domain_type__c})+", "+ " Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c = " + ({!Get_Lead.Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details__c})+", "+ " Employees_Min__c = " + text({!Get_Lead.Employees_Min__c})+", "+ " Lead Source = " + text({!Get_Lead.LeadSource})+", "+ " Quiz Data Incomplete = " + {!Get_Lead.Quiz_Data_Incomplete__c}+", "+ " ROE_Division__c = " + ({!Get_Lead.ROE_Division__c})+", "+ " Secondary_email__c = " + ({!Get_Lead.Secondary_email__c})+", "+ " Seniority__c = " + text({!Get_Lead.Seniority__c})+", "+ " SI Enrichment Visit = " + text({!Get_Lead.SI_Enrichment_Visits__c})+", "+ " SW_Industry__c = " + text({!Get_Lead.SW_Industry__c})+", "+ " Title = " + ({!Get_Lead.Title})+", "+ " Use_of_Similarweb__c = " + text({!Get_Lead.Use_of_Similarweb__c})+", "+ " Website = " + ({!Get_Lead.Website})+", "+ " LinkedIn Profile = " + ({!Get_Lead.LinkedIn_Profile__c})+", "+ " LinkedIn = " + ({!Get_Lead.LinkedIn__c})+", "+ " Website = " + ({!Get_Lead.Website})+", "+ " SI_Enrichment_Visits__c = " + text({!Get_Lead.SI_Enrichment_Visits__c})+", "+ " sw_connector_Total Monthly Visits = " + text({!Get_Lead.sw_connector__swId__r.sw_connector__Visits__c})+", "+ " Clean Domain = " + ({!Get_Lead.Clean_Domain__c})+", "+ " ROE_Division__c = " + ({!Get_Lead.ROE_Division__c})

formulas.description: MIS-6546 - First MQL Date 2.0 - Year 2100 fix
formulas.name: Lead_SW_Fit_Score_Timestamp_2100

Flow.interviewLabel: BI Data - After Save - Trigger Flow {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: BI Data - After Save - Trigger Flow

recordLookups.name: Contact_Get_Soft_Hard_MQL_Notification_Type
recordLookups.label: Contact - Get Soft/Hard MQL Notification Type

recordLookups.name: Lead_Get_Soft_Hard_MQL_Notification_Type
recordLookups.label: Lead - Get Soft/Hard MQL Notification Type

textTemplates.name: Contact_Soft_Hard_MQL_Notification_Body
textTemplates.text: The Contact {!Get_Contact.FirstName} {!Get_Contact.LastName} has received {!Get_Contact.Mql_Status__c} Status. Please reach out ASAP!

textTemplates.name: Lead_Soft_Hard_MQL_Notification_Body
textTemplates.text: The Lead {!Get_Lead.FirstName} {!Get_Lead.LastName} has received {!Get_Lead.mql_status__c} Status. Please reach out ASAP!
